repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Presidents Council of Cornell Women records
did.abstract: Includes meeting minutes, bylaws, membership information, publicity photographs, DVDs, CDs and videotapes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: The President's Council of Cornell Women (PCCW) was founded in 1990 by former President Frank Rhodes. It is a group of alumnae working to enhance the involvement of women students, faculty, staff, and alumnae as leaders within Cornell University and its many communities.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: President's Council of Cornell Women Records, #41-9-3922. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes meeting minutes, bylaws, membership information, publicity photographs, DVDs, CDs and videotapes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: PCCW Fall meeting material, 2014; PCCW Annual Meeting At-A-Glance program, 2014; 25th Anniversary Annual Meeting 2015 meeting packet, infographic poster signed by meeting attendees, and letter of congratulations from President David J. Skorton.

controlaccess.geogname: Tompkins County (N.Y.) -- Social life and customs.

Women -- New York (State) -- Ithaca -- Societies and clubs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes CD-2606 - contains a PDF of the original poster, which was 18" x 84"
